name: low_vol_eligible_insufficient_20d
description: 20 days of alternating SPY and AAA returns. Under team-lead Ruling 2 (AC-4 eligible-pool sufficiency), a 20-day raw history is INSUFFICIENT: after the early-window exclusion drops the first MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS-1 = 19 days, only 1 eligible day remains — far below MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS. A degenerate 1-neighbour kNN must never reach the exit gate, so run_monte_carlo returns the out-of-band insufficient sentinel. This fixture pins that eligible-insufficient short-circuit (the pre-Ruling-2 'boundary at MC-min' concept is gone — the raw-day boundary no longer exists).
derivation: 20 raw days -> 1 eligible day after the early-window exclusion (20 - (MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS - 1)) -> below MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS. Ruling 2 (Option ii): the sufficiency guard counts eligible days, so this history is insufficient and run_monte_carlo returns MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL (None) — no degenerate 1-neighbour kNN ever reaches the exit gate. No producer value is pinned; the short-circuit returns before any Monte Carlo draw.
